news.title:
Trent shares surged over 3% after a strong Q4 business update.
The stock emerged as the top gainer on the Nifty index.
news.summary:
Trent shares surged over 3% after a strong Q4 business update.
The stock emerged as the top gainer on the Nifty index.

news.title:
Trent's Q4FY26 revenue rose 20% YoY to ₹4,937 Cr; FY26 revenue up 18% YoY.
Merchandise sales grew 21% in Q4; store count at 1,286 with Westside, Zudio expansion.
news.summary:
Trent's Q4FY26 revenue rose 20% YoY to ₹4,937 Cr; FY26 revenue up 18% YoY.
Merchandise sales grew 21% in Q4; store count at 1,286 with Westside, Zudio expansion.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains a neutral stance on Trent.
Target price for Trent is reduced to 4,080 by Goldman Sachs.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs maintains a neutral stance on Trent.
Target price for Trent is reduced to 4,080 by Goldman Sachs.

news.title: Trent's Q4 revenue surged 20% to Rs 4,937 crore, drawing market attention.
news.summary: Trent's Q4 revenue surged 20% to Rs 4,937 crore, drawing market attention.

news.title:
Axis Securities warns of margin pressure on HUL, Dabur, Asian Paints due to rising crude and input costs.
FMCG, paints, QSR, and retail sectors face cost shocks; Jubilant FoodWorks, Trent, and V-Mart most vulnerable.
news.summary:
Axis Securities warns of margin pressure on HUL, Dabur, Asian Paints due to rising crude and input costs.
FMCG, paints, QSR, and retail sectors face cost shocks; Jubilant FoodWorks, Trent, and V-Mart most vulnerable.

news.title:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.
news.summary:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.

news.title:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.
news.summary:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.

news.title:
42 Nifty 50 stocks trade below FY26 analyst targets, highest in a decade.
Trent, TCS, and ITC underperform, while Shriram Finance leads outperformers at 28.7% above target.
news.summary:
42 Nifty 50 stocks trade below FY26 analyst targets, highest in a decade.
Trent, TCS, and ITC underperform, while Shriram Finance leads outperformers at 28.7% above target.

news.title:
Trent Ltd's board to consider issuing unsecured NCDs up to ₹500 Cr on Mar 26, 2026.
NCDs worth ₹500 Cr issued in 2021 are due for redemption on May 29, 2026.
news.summary:
Trent Ltd's board to consider issuing unsecured NCDs up to ₹500 Cr on Mar 26, 2026.
NCDs worth ₹500 Cr issued in 2021 are due for redemption on May 29, 2026.

news.title:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.
news.summary:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.

news.title:
Tata Group Q3 FY26 results show diverse performance; Titan saw 36% QoQ revenue growth, TCS revenue rose 2%, but profit declined 12%.
Tata Steel revenue fell 3% QoQ but surged 6% YoY; Trent and Oriental Hotels showed strong profitability, while Tata Investment profits dropped QoQ.
news.summary:
Tata Group Q3 FY26 results show diverse performance; Titan saw 36% QoQ revenue growth, TCS revenue rose 2%, but profit declined 12%.
Tata Steel revenue fell 3% QoQ but surged 6% YoY; Trent and Oriental Hotels showed strong profitability, while Tata Investment profits dropped QoQ.

news.title:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
InterGlobe, Trent, UltraTech fell; ONGC, Oil India gained as Brent crude crossed $71/barrel.
news.summary:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
InterGlobe, Trent, UltraTech fell; ONGC, Oil India gained as Brent crude crossed $71/barrel.

news.title:
Trent may miss Q4 FY26 guidance, adding only 9 Zudio stores in 45 days.
To meet its FY26 target, Trent needs 90–110 new stores in Q4, challenging at current pace.
news.summary:
Trent may miss Q4 FY26 guidance, adding only 9 Zudio stores in 45 days.
To meet its FY26 target, Trent needs 90–110 new stores in Q4, challenging at current pace.

news.title:
Trent's Co-CEO reveals focus on growth in Tier 3 and Tier 4 towns.
Despite lower revenue and spending, smaller towns are the new target areas.
news.summary:
Trent's Co-CEO reveals focus on growth in Tier 3 and Tier 4 towns.
Despite lower revenue and spending, smaller towns are the new target areas.

news.title:
Trent Ltd's CEO highlights a shift towards smaller towns for growth.
This strategy aligns with recovery in discretionary demand post GST changes.
news.summary:
Trent Ltd's CEO highlights a shift towards smaller towns for growth.
This strategy aligns with recovery in discretionary demand post GST changes.

news.title:
Trent's 25% growth target remains intact, says P. Venkatesalu.
This statement was made during the Retail Leadership Summit.
news.summary:
Trent's 25% growth target remains intact, says P. Venkatesalu.

news.title:
Trent plans expansion into tier-3, tier-4 cities for growth.
Tata Group's retail arm sees strong potential in smaller markets.
news.summary:
Trent plans expansion into tier-3, tier-4 cities for growth.
Tata Group's retail arm sees strong potential in smaller markets.

news.title:
Trent plans expansion in smaller Indian towns, targeting growth outside metro markets.
The company added 100+ stores in nine months, reaching over 1,100 outlets.
news.summary:
Trent plans expansion in smaller Indian towns, targeting growth outside metro markets.

news.title:
Trent tops Nifty gainers, rising 3% post Q3 results.
IT stocks like Mphasis, Infosys, and Coforge fall over 1%.
news.summary:

news.title:
Kotak Securities cuts Trent's target price to Rs 3850, reducing FY26-28 revenue projections by 1-8%.
FY2028 EPS projections for Trent are also reduced by 6% by Kotak Securities.
news.summary:
Kotak Securities cuts Trent's target price to Rs 3850, reducing FY26-28 revenue projections by 1-8%.
